_comment: Acknowledged, unrecoverable capture misses. capture_audit.py stays GREEN (exit 0) for these and goes RED (exit 1) only on a NEW miss it hasn't seen. Keyed by kickoff in UTC minute precision (the match names carry unstable bracket placeholders, the kickoff time does not). To acknowledge a fresh miss you've reviewed and cannot recover: run `python scripts/capture_audit.py --ack`, then commit + deploy this file. All five below are casualties of the Jun 29 - Jul 2 placeholder-resolution crash, since fixed.

acknowledged.2026-06-29T20:30: Germany vs Paraguay - placeholder-resolution crash (pre-fix), never launched, unrecoverable
acknowledged.2026-06-30T17:00: Ivory Coast vs Norway - placeholder-resolution crash (pre-fix), never launched, unrecoverable
acknowledged.2026-06-30T21:00: 1I vs 3C/D/F/G/H - placeholder-resolution crash (pre-fix), never launched, unrecoverable
acknowledged.2026-07-01T01:00: Mexico vs Ecuador - placeholder crash; salvaged manually, so absent from the scheduler state file
acknowledged.2026-07-02T00:00: USA vs Bosnia & Herzegovina - acknowledged 2026-07-17 as unrecoverable
